Tactile Echoes

There is a profound, aching sort of tenderness in the way hands find each other. Giving my old school notes a second life. I may not have been the top of my class, but this paper is finally being put to good use. Still got a ton of these waiting to be animated. 8 fps and 24 frames total.

Commission slot still open. If you'd like to have a special moment animated custom just for you, feel free to send a DM. Let's bring your story to life!

#handdrawnanimation #animation #sketch #art #framebyframe

ðï¸ The definitive song of Franceâs 2018 World Cup victory celebration is âRamenez la coupe Ã  la maisonâ (Bring the Cup Back Home) by French artist Vegedream.

The track was released immediately after France defeated Croatia 4â2 in Moscow. It instantly went viral, hitting number one on the French charts and serving as the official soundtrack for the teamâs victory parade down the Champs-ÃlysÃ©es and their celebrations at the Stade de France

The lyrics directly honor individual squad members, detailing their play styles or personalities

The opening line, âCasse la dÃ©marche comme Samuel, Samuel Umtitiâ (Break your stride like Samuel Umtiti), mimics the defenderâs famous swaggering goal celebration from the semi-final match against Belgium

Shouts out his quick step-overs and lightning acceleration.

While celebrating, the team and fans heavily highlighted midfielder NâGolo KantÃ©, often pairing this track with an additional viral fan chant praising him for being small, nice, and âstopping Leo Messiâ

Follow @100_moments.of.glory to see all episodes ð¤©

Tonight, thv took a turn in the audience as he watched @gracieabrams and @dojacat perform at #VogueWorld: Hollywood. No stranger to a fashion show either, the @bts.bighitofficial star dressed in a look that could have easily appeared on the runway.
